_comment: SMILES model (no vocab.txt; uses tokenizer.json). Ships custom modeling code (ChemPepMTR.py, config.py, __init__.py) — the block must load it with trust_remote_code=True, and the .py files MUST be bundled (hence the include override). Revision pinned for reproducible builds; bump from https://huggingface.co/aaronfeller/peptideclm-2-hybrid-large/commits/main. MIT verified against github.com/AaronFeller/PeptideCLM-2 + AaronFeller/PeptideMTR (Copyright (c) 2025 Aaron Feller); the HF card carries no license tag, so we ship the MIT text in ./LICENSE.
